creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-12-14 20:54:47 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    biology              Makefile 
  Added files:
    biology/mummer       Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  MUMmer is a modular system for the rapid whole genome alignment of finished
  or draft sequence. This package provides an efficient suffix tree library,
  seed-and-extend alignment, SNP detection, repeat detection, and
  visualization tools.
  
  WWW:    http://mummer.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/118142
  Submitted by:   Tony Maher
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.93      +1 -0      ports/biology/Makefile
  1.1       +43 -0     ports/biology/mummer/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/biology/mummer/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/biology/mummer/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +26 -0     ports/biology/mummer/pkg-plist (new)
